description: CompositionBlack cross-trainers made with synthetic pppers, fabric lining and phylon soleshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese uber cool black sneakers from fila are perfect for running, training and urban wear. The mesh uppers make these shoes highly comfortable and breathable while the bright red panels give an added edge. The cushioned lining gives you greater comfort for extended periods of time while the multi-directional grooves along the lightweight phylon sole ensure extcellent grip.
